best_match.title: GTM Product Marketing Manager, Commerce Experiences

jobs.title: GTM Product Marketing Manager, Commerce Experiences

resume_core.label: Stripe — GTM Product Marketing Manager, Commerce Experiences
resume_core.summary: Marketing and business analyst with 6 years of experience turning customer, funnel, and campaign data into growth decisions across enterprise SaaS and fintech, backed by a STEM MBA in Business Analytics & Machine Learning.

experience.title: MBA Intern - Sales & Marketing Analytics
highlights: Modeled the lead-to-demo funnel in SQL across CRM and outbound-activity data, exposing speed-to-lead and routing gaps in a Tableau dashboard; rebuilt routing and ICP segmentation on the findings, lifting lead-to-demo conversion 30%.
Ran cohort analysis to compare conversion by segment, prioritizing India as a high-opportunity growth market.
Designed and analyzed A/B tests on outbound messaging, selecting winning variants that lifted LinkedIn acceptance rates to 25%+.
Led 40+ C-suite discovery interviews to pressure-test the ICP, surfacing pain points that reshaped the product roadmap.
Analyzed self-serve product telemetry to pinpoint activation drop-off, informing the activation framework in Glidely's product-led-growth motion.

experience.title: Marketing & Analytics Specialist
highlights: Defined named-account segmentation and targeting criteria for multi-channel ABM across 50+ countries, driving a 28% conversion uplift across 100+ enterprise banking clients.
Built and measured named-account targeting parameters and outbound cadence performance in Salesforce and Eloqua to guide pipeline prioritization.
Designed Finacle's first pulse-analytics measurement strategy, lifting brand recall 2.4x and earning the Best Internal Campaign Award.
Ran competitive analysis feeding battlecards and monetization deep-dives for 50+ account executives, cutting sales-cycle length 15%.
Orchestrated 10+ executive roundtables and client briefings that deepened relationships and accelerated late-stage deals.

experience.title: Lead Consultant, Product Marketing
highlights: Ran quantitative win/loss analysis and competitive benchmarking across enterprise deals, identifying loss drivers and sharpening positioning that lifted competitive win-rates 10%.
Delivered 80+ executive presentations to CIOs and CTOs across EMEA, APAC, and North America, tailoring each to client priorities and decision criteria.
Authored thought-leadership content and executive briefings that grew website engagement 40% and strengthened pipeline quality.

experience.title: Marketing Manager
highlights: Built an impact-measurement framework across 20+ partnerships and 50M+ impressions, driving 200% growth in program reach.
Ran conversion-rate-optimization analysis across donor-acquisition funnels to raise ~$35K through digital campaigns.
Unified operational frameworks across marketing, legal, and finance, earning the YES League of Excellency Award.

education.details: Fairleigh S. Dickinson, Jr. Global Manager Award

jobs.referral_message:
Hi there — hope you're doing well! I saw that Stripe is hiring for a GTM Product Marketing Manager, Commerce Experiences role (https://stripe.com/jobs/search?gh_jid=7990812), and it lines up closely with my background in B2B marketing, GTM, and analytics. Since you're at Stripe, would you be open to referring me or pointing me to the right person on the team? Happy to send my resume and a quick blurb to make it easy. Thanks so much!

— Priyanka Tambe
